AUDIT-REGISTRY-001.title: Stamp every cleanup pass in the audit registry
AUDIT-REGISTRY-001.instruction: Refresh file inventory before broad work, then stamp touched files and pass proof before finalizing.
sunset_when: The registry update is enforced by automation or CI
Three consecutive cleanup passes include complete pass receipts

DOC-HYGIENE-001.title: Prefer versioned owners over new markdown sprawl
DOC-HYGIENE-001.instruction: Update an existing source-of-truth doc or registry entry before creating a new doc. Mark stale snapshots historical instead of letting conflicting instructions accumulate.
sunset_when: Docs index and doc_versions remain current for five broad passes

DESIGN-PRIMITIVES-001.title: Prefer shared design primitives over repeated local shells
DESIGN-PRIMITIVES-001.instruction: Before creating local card, sheet, empty-state, rail, row, badge, skeleton, or section UI, check existing primitives such as CatchSurface, CatchBottomSheetScaffold, CatchEmptyState, CatchHorizontalRail, CatchVerticalSection, PersonRow, RunCard, SettingsRow, CatchBadge, and CatchSkeleton.
sunset_when: Widget catalog shows no repeated local shells outside intentional feature-specific UI

DESIGN-TOKENS-001.title: Keep design-system ownership centralized
DESIGN-TOKENS-001.instruction: Theme tokens, typography, app theme, spacing, radius, motion, icon sizes, and compatibility layout helpers should live under lib/core/theme. Do not add new design primitives under generic lib/constants or a parallel top-level lib/theme folder.
sunset_when: Legacy spacing compatibility usage is either migrated or intentionally documented

DEBUG-LOOP-001.title: Use interactive phone debug logs as feedback evidence
DEBUG-LOOP-001.instruction: When user is clicking through the app on a physical phone, run an interactive flutter run session through tool/flutter_with_env.sh, keep stdin open for reload/restart, and summarize fresh logs in pass proof.
sunset_when: A stable automated device-smoke workflow replaces manual debug sessions

CONTROLLER-BOUNDARY-001.title: Keep product behavior out of presentation widgets
CONTROLLER-BOUNDARY-001.instruction: Widgets may own focus, scroll, animations, navigation, temporary input state, and rendering. Move repository writes, validation decisions, mutation orchestration, and product side effects into controllers, view-model providers, or repositories.
sunset_when: Presentation repository-provider scanner stays clean for five cleanup passes

PROVIDER-SEAM-001.title: Use feature-owned provider seams
PROVIDER-SEAM-001.instruction: If a feature has a view model, controller, or feature-specific provider, screens should use that seam rather than reaching around it to a lower-level repository provider.
sunset_when: Feature screens consistently read view models/controllers and no scanner reaches remain

EXTERNAL-SIDE-EFFECT-001.title: Put plugin and platform side effects behind seams
EXTERNAL-SIDE-EFFECT-001.instruction: Store launches, URL launches, share sheets, image pickers, connectivity subscriptions, FCM setup, and other platform/plugin effects should sit behind providers/controllers/services so tests can replace them.
sunset_when: Presentation plugin/platform import scanner remains clean for five passes

TOKEN-DRILLING-001.title: Avoid prop drilling CatchTokens
TOKEN-DRILLING-001.instruction: Prefer CatchTokens.of(context) inside leaf widgets instead of passing CatchTokens through constructors unless intentionally rendering with a non-current token set.
sunset_when: Token prop-drilling scanner remains clean for three passes

TEST-ASYNC-001.title: Use named async test flushing helpers
TEST-ASYNC-001.instruction: Use flushTestEventQueue instead of raw Future<void>.delayed(Duration.zero) when tests need queued provider stream or callback delivery.
sunset_when: Scanner reports no raw zero-delay async flushes for three passes

WIDGET-TEST-001.title: Centralize broad widget test settling
WIDGET-TEST-001.instruction: Use semantic/domain pump helpers or pumpFeatureUi instead of scattered raw pumpAndSettle calls in feature tests.
sunset_when: Only the approved centralized helper-level broad wait remains
No feature-level raw pumpAndSettle appears for three passes

WIDGET-SEMANTICS-001.title: Make custom tappables semantic before testing them
WIDGET-SEMANTICS-001.instruction: Before adding fragile widget finders, give custom tap targets stable semantics, labels, tooltips, or keys that describe real user actions.
sunset_when: Feature tappable scanner remains clean for three cleanup passes

SLIVER-001.title: Respect sliver ownership and NestedScrollView overlap contracts
SLIVER-001.instruction: If a parent owns a CustomScrollView, children should usually return slivers; NestedScrollView tabs must inject absorbed overlap or own the inner scroll view.
sunset_when: Sliver screens have dedicated regression tests and no known blank/overflow regressions
